title: The Courthouse Becomes the Goal
description: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Enies Lobby guard, Rob Lucci, Sanji. Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ..... the straw hats have shown up?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But we only lost five people

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Don't remove nice Nico Robin's Kairouseki* lock.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm in no mood for a toast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a (Chill, even in the govern-ment

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Surely this is the sole assassin group.

dialogue.speaker: Enies Lobby guard
dialogue.text: There must be countless guards here!!

summary: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
